improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, unlimited workspace. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value prop (Claude-powered AI, trade/business focus) and the offer (3 free searches, US$2/day entry). Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for a B2B audience. Keeping copy factual and concise builds trust and avoids overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a powerful workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces the product name and its core function, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the risk-free trial with 'no card required' to reduce friction and boost conversions. Copy is concise, benefit-driven, and maintains a confident professional tone without making unsubstantiated claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and professional assistance whenever you need it.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens when the trial ends. By clearly explaining the transition and reinforcing value (unlimited access, voice chat, savings), it reduces uncertainty and encourages conversion at the paywall moment.
